number_val_bands.info: Number of valence bands in BSE kernel. REQUIRED.

number_cond_bands.info: Number of conduction bands in BSE kernel. REQUIRED.

screened_coulomb_cutoff.info: Cutoff for screened Coulomb W in Ry. Must be <= epsilon_cutoff.

bare_coulomb_cutoff.info: Cutoff for bare Coulomb v in Ry. Must be <= wavefunction cutoff.

read_kpoints.info: Read k-points from kpoints file instead of WFN.

write_vcoul.info: Write bare Coulomb potential to file.

low_comm.info: Each PE stores whole dielectric matrix (less communication, more memory).

low_memory.info: Calculate matrix elements separately for each k,c,v,k',c',v'.

extended_kernel.info: Calculate kernel for all (n1,n2)->(n1',n2') transitions. Required for non-TDA BSE.

dont_use_hdf5.info: Use binary format for epsmat instead of HDF5.

wfn_hdf5_min_band_block.info: Minimum band block size for HDF5 WFN reading.

no_symmetries_coarse_grid.info: Do not unfold BZ using symmetries (default).

use_symmetries_coarse_grid.info: Use symmetries to unfold BZ in WFN_co.

fullbz_replace.info: Replace unfolded BZ with full BZ (experimental).

die_outside_sphere.info: Die if G-vectors fall outside sphere after rotation.

ignore_outside_sphere.info: Ignore G-vectors outside sphere after rotation.

fermi_level_relative.info: Treat fermi_level as relative to mean-field Fermi.

exciton_Q_shift.info: Finite Q kernel. Format: Qflag Qx Qy Qz. Qflag: 0=read WFNq_co, 1=Q=0, 2=commensurate shift.

energy_loss.info: Include long range exchange. Auto-activated with exciton_Q_shift.

patched_sampling_co.info: Use patched sampling for coarse grid (experimental).

n_ffts_per_batch.info: FFTs per batch in mtxel kernel.

mtxel_algo.info: GPU mtxel algorithm: CPU_ALGO, OPENACC_ALGO, OMP_TARGET_ALGO.

g_sum_algo.info: GPU g_sum algorithm: CPU_ALGO, OPENACC_ALGO, OMP_TARGET_ALGO.

w_sum_algo.info: GPU w_sum algorithm: CPU_ALGO, OPENACC_ALGO, OMP_TARGET_ALGO. Must match g_sum_algo.
